zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland於1350年之前出生時，她的父親Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau30歲，母親Anna poland Polcka25歲。她和Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz至少有2個女兒。她去世於1390年3月27日，埋葬在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊瓦福。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Sagan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Casimir, Elzbieta, Henryka, Jacek, Janusz, Jozef, Wladyslaw, Wojciech, Zdzislaw, Zygmunt.
Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Polish sagan ‘kettle’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of pots and pans, or a nickname from the same word in a less clear application.
Czech and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Sagan (Czech Zaháň), a place in Lower Silesia.

variants.name: Segan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer.  Serbian or Croatian Simo, Zarko.
Serbian and Croatian (Šegan): nickname derived from the root of šegati se ‘to joke, to poke fun at someone’. Compare Sega and Sego .

nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland was born before 1350, her father, Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau, was 30 and her mother, Anna poland Polcka, was 25. She had at least 2 daughters with Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. She died on 27 March 1390, and was buried in Wrocław, Wrocław, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland est née avant 1350, son père, Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna poland Polcka, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1390, et a été enterrée à Wrocław, wrocławskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland vor 1350 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau 30 und ihre Mutter Anna poland Polcka 25. Sie hatte mit Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1390 und wurde in Wrocław, wrocławskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland è nata il prima del 1350, sua padre, Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anna poland Polcka, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. Morì il 27 marzo 1390, e fu sepolta a Wrocław, wrocławskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Polandが1350年以前に生まれた時，父Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogauは30歳，母Anna poland Polckaは25歳であった。彼女はHerzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitzとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1390年3月27日に死去し，ポーランドウロクlアウスキウロクlアウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland(이)가 1350년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna poland Polcka(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 3월 27일 사망했으며 폴란드 록l아w스키 록l아w에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland nasceu antes 1350, seu pai, Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna poland Polcka, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1390, e foi sepultada em Wrocław, wrocławskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland родилась перед 1350 г., её отцу по имени Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna poland Polcka, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. Она умерла 27 марта 1390 г. и была похоронена в местности рокlав, рокlавски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hedwig of Sagan Queen Consort of Poland nació antes de 1350, su papá, Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna poland Polcka, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Herzog Ruprecht von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Liegnitz. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1390, y fue sepultada en Wrocław, wrocławskie, Polonia.

16 กุมภาพันธ์ 1363
